query:
_index=sumologic_audit _sourceName=VOLUME_QUOTA _sourceCategory=account_management budget  {{{keywords}}}
//| parse "Capacity: * bytes\nUsage: * bytes\nUsage status: *\nAction: *\n" as capacity_bytes,used_bytes,status,action

| parse "Budget * with scope * consumed" as name,scope
| parse "consumed *% of capacity and is reset at *." as percent,reset_time
| parse "Capacity: * bytes" as capacity_bytes
| parse "Usage: * bytes" as used_bytes
| sort _messagetime 
| first(capacity_bytes) as capacity_bytes, first(percent) as percent by name 
| capacity_bytes/1024/1024 as mb
|  num(percent) as percent |sort percent
| if (percent >=100 ,"exceeded","ok") as status
| fields -capacity_bytes

variables.name: keywords
variables.values: *,// any search keywords,not installed* not filecollection*,budget
